judgment.summary: High-margin software business with robust free cash flow and an attractive valuation relative to growth.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS was 0.97 vs estimate 0.97 (in line); next earnings date is 2026-07-22.
positives: PEG ratio 0.92 — suggests attractive valuation relative to growth.
Forward P/E 20.58 vs trailing 61.56 — indicates significant expected earnings expansion.
Gross margin 76.6% — reflects high profitability on core offerings.
Free cash flow (TTM) $5.11B — shows robust cash generation.
Total cash $5.18B vs total debt $2.43B — represents a strong net cash position.
negatives: Current ratio 0.84 and quick ratio 0.69 — suggest potential short-term liquidity tightness.
Earnings growth 2.3% — significantly trails the 22.1% revenue growth.
Trailing P/E 61.56 — represents a high historical valuation multiple.
